$comment: Known legacy redirect manifest (remediation Phase 5 / D1 + 2026-07 peptide repositioning). Sources: old App.tsx client-side wildcard routes at monorepo commit 9398453, plus the TRT/weight-loss/services service pages retired by the peptide repositioning (each 301s single-hop to its peptide equivalent). Unknown URLs intentionally return HTTP 404 — no catch-all. Vercel serves permanent redirects as 308.
